$schemaNotes: Server/CI-only research registry for the monthly ATS discovery process. Never loaded by index.html or app.js. Finding an ATS link here does NOT add anything to monitoring/employer-feed-watch.json or live-opportunity-sources.js — see docs/operations/monthly-ats-discovery.md for the required human review stages between 'observed' and 'live'.

candidates.notes: docs/integrations/ats-source-audit.md id 1: an Oracle Cloud sign-in target (fa-euwp-saasfaprod1.fa.ocs.oraclecloud.com/hcmUI/CandidateExperience/en/sites/Mayo-US) surfaced under Mayo Clinic's own name via WebSearch, never directly page-loaded. No public read API is known for this platform.
docs/integrations/ats-source-audit.md id 2: fmr.wd1.myworkdayjobs.com/FidelityCareers surfaced under Fidelity's own site name. Not independently technically validated.

docs/integrations/ats-source-audit.md id 3: jea.taleo.net/careersection/jea+-+external/... found under JEA's own name. Shares canonicalEmployerKey 'jea' with employerId 31 (JEA Skilled Craft Apprenticeship) — same organization, same careers hub — so the monthly checker fetches this URL once for both records.

docs/integrations/ats-source-audit.md id 7: the existing curated data.js URL is itself a live-looking myworkdayjobs.com domain. Confidence is high because the domain shape can't be faked, but the endpoint was never independently technically validated, and the Academy of Business program is placed through specific high schools rather than a general open-posting workflow.
docs/integrations/ats-source-audit.md id 8: jobs-ufhealth.icims.com surfaced. iCIMS's public read-API access model is typically partner/OAuth-gated and was not confirmed either way.
docs/integrations/ats-source-audit.md id 9: careers-ice.icims.com is the primary signal; a secondary theice.referrals.selectminds.com (SelectMinds) is likely a referral tool, not the primary ATS.
docs/integrations/ats-source-audit.md id 10: NOT VERIFIED — no platform-identifying URL surfaced. No platform is guessed here.

docs/integrations/ats-source-audit.md id 13: confirmed on iCIMS — Miller Electric's own official internship page links directly to the public EMCOR iCIMS job search at careers-emcorgroup.icims.com/jobs/search?searchKeyword=%23miller&ss=1. Already status 'watch' in monitoring/employer-feed-watch.json (sourceId miller-electric-icims, provider icims_public_portal), rechecked weekly by scripts/check-employer-feeds.mjs. This is controlled monitoring of the public career-portal page only — no authenticated iCIMS customer/integration API (api.icims.com) has been established, and none is planned as part of this monitoring. The monthly check here exists only to catch a careers-page URL change, not to re-validate content — that is the weekly job.
